implementation_notes: Portable execution-report parity fixture exists for replace and delete.
Comment-owned selection semantics are represented by the first-class target_selection request descriptor.
Comment-owned match boundaries and payload semantics are represented by the first-class target_match request descriptor.

notes: Equivalent owner and comment-region semantics now have a shared request substrate.

implementation_notes: Callable destination semantics are represented by the first-class callable_destination request descriptor.
Callable-destination requests can be transported through the generic structured_edit_request envelope.
Heading-section selection semantics are represented by the first-class target_selection request descriptor.
Heading-section match boundaries and section-branch payload semantics are represented by the first-class target_match request descriptor.

notes: Equivalent heading-section ownership now has a shared request substrate.
Equivalent heading-section ownership now has a shared request substrate.

remaining_gaps: Provider executors can now adopt callable_destination, target_selection, and target_match directly and retire compatibility metadata as follow-up.
